# HispaniCoders LLM Guide

HispaniCoders helps US companies scale engineering teams with premium LATAM talent.

## Core services
- LATAM staff augmentation for US startups and growth companies
- Fast candidate matching for software engineering, QA, data, AI, and DevOps roles
- Hiring process support from role definition to onboarding

## Ideal customers
- US founders, CTOs, engineering managers, and talent leaders
- Teams that need timezone overlap, strong English communication, and reliable delivery

## Important pages
- Home: https://hispanicoders.com/
- Why LATAM: https://hispanicoders.com/why-latam
- Staff Augmentation: https://hispanicoders.com/staff-augmentation
- Talent: https://hispanicoders.com/talent
- Industries: https://hispanicoders.com/industries
- How It Works: https://hispanicoders.com/how-it-works
- Resources: https://hispanicoders.com/resources
- Contact: https://hispanicoders.com/contact
